name: cpig-kin-02-fork-sweep
description: kin-02 Fork Sweep — load the leading-link front-fork sweep variant (motion driver J_lower -25°→+25° over 30 steps), assemble + sweep + animate to mid-travel + render the posed skeleton + read the axle_path trace sensor. Verifies Phase 2.B + 2.C end-to-end.

setup.vlmDescription: A four-bar linkage front-fork skeleton drawn in line-art, posed near mid-travel of its suspension sweep. A vertical ground column on the left with two ground pivots, two parallel links extending right to a wheel-carrier link that has translated downward and slightly forward from its starting position, with a diagonal coil-spring (zig-zag pattern) between the column's upper end and the upper link. Each pivot shows a small orange circle (revolute glyph). At every named frame a small red/green/blue axis triad is visible.
